heading: Consumer lease advertising; liability of advertising media
label: 1667c Consumer lease advertising; liability of advertising media
notes: Amendments2010—Subsec. (c)(1)(D). , (10)(A), made similar amendments, resulting in the substitution of “the Bureau” for “the Board”.Pub. L. 111–203, § 1100A(2)1996—Subsec. (a) consisting of introductory provisions and 5 pars. relating to contents of lease agreements required if consumer lease advertisement stated amount of payment, number of required payments, or that any or no payments were required at lease inception.Pub. (b) as (c) and struck out former subsec. children.text: the transaction advertised is a lease;
the total amount of any initial payments required on or before consummation of the lease or delivery of the property, whichever is later;
that a security deposit is required;
the number, amount, and timing of scheduled payments; and

with respect to a lease in which the liability of the consumer at the end of the lease term is based on the anticipated residual value of the property, that an extra charge may be imposed at the end of the lease term.

children.heading: Advertising medium not liable
children.label: b Advertising medium not liable
children.text: No owner or employee of any entity that serves as a medium in which an advertisement appears or through which an advertisement is disseminated, shall be liable under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: states the information required by paragraphs (1) and (2) of subsection (a);

children.label: B
children.text: states the number, amounts, due dates or periods of scheduled payments, and the total of such payments under the lease;

children.label: I
children.text: a toll-free telephone number established in accordance with paragraph (2) that may be used by consumers to obtain the information required under subsection (a); or

children.label: aa
children.text: appears in a publication in general circulation in the community served by the radio station on which such advertisement is broadcast during the period beginning 3 days before any such broadcast and ending 10 days after such broadcast; and

children.label: bb
children.text: includes the information required to be disclosed under subsection (a); and

children.label: ii
children.text: the name and dates of any publication referred to in clause (i)(II); and

children.label: D
children.text: includes any other information which the Bureau determines necessary to carry out this part.

children.label: i
children.text: establish such a toll-free telephone number not later than the date on which the advertisement including the referral is broadcast;

children.label: ii
children.text: maintain such telephone number for a period of not less than 10 days, beginning on the date of any such broadcast; and

children.label: iii
children.text: provide the information required under subsection (a) with respect to the lease to any person who calls such number.

children.heading: Form of information
children.label: B Form of information
children.text: The information required to be provided under subparagraph (A)(iii) shall be provided verbally or, if requested by the consumer, in written form.

children.heading: No effect on other law
children.label: 3 No effect on other law
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall affect the requirements of Federal law as such requirements apply to advertisement by any medium other than radio broadcast.
